supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on single contracted supplier or small number of suppliers for fuel provision and transportation; dependence on coal from international markets for non-US plants; natural gas from local suppliers in each market except Dominican Republic and Panama where LNG is imported; dependence on equipment suppliers with potential single-source risks
risks: Global supply chain disruptions; inability to obtain replacement equipment or parts due to supply chain disruption; reliance on single fuel supplier or small number of suppliers; fuel transportation constraints; international coal sourcing vulnerabilities; equipment availability from limited suppliers; supply chain bottlenecks in transmission system; severe bottlenecks in interconnection requests for renewables projects; restrictions on imports of solar panels, wind turbines, coal, oil, gas or other raw materials

Trade restrictions and tariffs on solar panels from Southeast Asia due to anti-dumping and countervailing duty investigations. Section 201 global tariff on solar cells and modules. Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act blocking imports from certain regions of China. Section 301 tariffs on Chinese lithium-ion batteries increasing to 25% in 2026. Potential reciprocal tariffs from Trump Administration. Supply chain disruptions for renewable energy equipment.
